scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.migrate:backend: cd backend && uv --cache-dir ../.uv-cache run python scripts/migrate.py
scripts.sync:admin: cd backend && uv --cache-dir ../.uv-cache run python scripts/sync_admin.py
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && uv run ruff check .
scripts.ingest:fixture: cd backend && uv run mathrag-ingest ingest --manifest ../data/manifests/ingestion-example.json --output ../data/processed/corpus.json
scripts.index:fixture: cd backend && uv run mathrag-ingest build-index --corpus ../data/processed/corpus.json --output ../data/manifests/local-corpus.json
